name: LE SSERAFIM
description:
LE SSERAFIM have just released their latest single Spaghetti and they've found a very unusual way to promote their song.

For tonight only, if your order some spaghetti on your house you have a chance of getting one of the LE SSERAFIM members as your delivery girl! This campaign has everything to be a hit amongst fans and due to the wording chosen on the announcement, things can get... saucy.


Update 17/12: Added a second intro with all the girls.


So, the way it works is that a random member should show up after the first message, LLMs normally aren't the best for randomness so if it's not showing one of them after rerolls or if you want a specific member, just use an OOC command. Also, use proxy for this one. Worked well on Deepseek.
creator: KingMat
